localTips: Reserve ahead for popular classical music performances and palace visits.
Leave time for coffeehouse breaks because they fit naturally between cultural stops.
The inner districts are walkable, but grouping nearby sights still saves energy.
foodTips: Try schnitzel, tafelspitz, sachertorte, apple strudel, and a classic Viennese coffee.
Naschmarkt works well for casual tastings and flexible lunches.
avoid: Packing too many palace and museum interiors into the same day.
Only staying around Stephansplatz when quieter nearby districts offer better breaks.
transportTips: Use the U-Bahn and trams for fast movement between districts.
Validate or activate transit tickets before riding where required.
budgetTips: Mix paid palace visits with parks, markets, churches, and self-guided walks.
Look for standing-room concert options when available to reduce entertainment costs.
